title: WebNN inference service integration
description: Repo-owned lane for WebNN (navigator.ml) integration using platform ML backends (ONNX Runtime on Windows, Core ML on macOS, TFLite on Linux/Android).
notes: Keep service/process integration here, not in generic platform build-fix patches.
Use patches/<platform> for platform-specific WebKit source changes.
Use patches/common for cross-platform WebNN WebKit interfaces.
Acceptance requires MiniBrowser runtime validation where navigator.ml.createContext() succeeds.
